headline: Will PTC Therapeutics (PTCT) Report Negative Earnings Next Week? What You Should Know
summary: PTC Therapeutics (PTCT) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
